title: Section 3A
content: 3A. Reservation of Seats in the House of People for Scheduled Castes and Scheduled Tribes in certain Part C States.---[Rep. by the Representation of the People Amendment) Act, 1958 (58 of 1958), s. 3 (w.e.f. 30-12-1958).]]
footnote: 1. Subs. by Act 47 of 1966, s. 2, for sections 3 and 4 (w.e.f. 14-12-1966).
